class.name: UCListItem
class.brief_description: Resource representing a single item/position in a universal controller (UCList).
class.description: [UCListItem] defines the behavior for a specific position of a train's universal controller (Zadajnik jazdy i hamowania), mapping it to traction percentages and pneumatic brake settings.

members.member: The position index to which the controller automatically bounces back.
The speed at which the target value decreases.
The speed at which the target value increases.
The maximum percentage value for this position.
The minimum percentage value for this position.
The nearest stable position index when moving downwards.
The nearest stable position index when moving upwards.
The pneumatic brake position index associated with this universal controller position.
The index of this controller position.
The target percentage value the controller aims to reach at this position.
